changelog: New listing wizard: choose Multi-product listing on Etsy — Studio creates drafts, then guides you to combine them in Printify (one listing for tee + hoodie + mug).
Warns when listing titles must be unique or personalization blocks combining.
Other orders no longer duplicate orders already linked in Printify — filters by Etsy receipt id.
highlights: New listing wizard: choose Multi-product listing on Etsy — Studio creates drafts, then guides you to combine them in Printify (one listing for tee + hoodie + mug).
Warns when listing titles must be unique or personalization blocks combining.
Other orders no longer duplicate orders already linked in Printify — filters by Etsy receipt id.
